title: Grey squirrel species management plan (PA7) template
body: "You need to apply for a capital grants plan with the Rural Payments Agency (RPA) before you can use and claim this capital item.   Once you have your agreement, complete the grey squirrel species management plan template to:     assess the impact that grey squirrel are having on your land    record the control and monitoring methods you will use    create a map of your holding where you will control and monitor grey squirrel     The completed template and map will be your grey squirrel species management plan.    Find full details about the grey squirrel control and management action and associated capital items.  Get your plan approved   You need to get your grey squirrel species management plan template approved by your local Forestry Commission operational delivery team hub. You should do this once you get your capital grants plan agreement with RPA.   Find your local Forestry Commission operational delivery team hub.   Make a claim for payment   1. Submit a claim for payment using the Rural Payments service or a claim form.   2. Submit your template and map by post or email to RPA.    Rural Payments AgencyPO Box 324WorksopS95 1DFEmail: ruralpayments@defra.gov.uk    Please quote your single business identifier (SBI) and agreement number in all enquiries.   Templates for managing other species   There are different templates for managing other species under this capital grants plan item. Find templates for:     American mink species management plan PA7 template   deer species management plan PA7 template   edible dormouse species management plan PA7 template   invasive non-native plant species management plan PA7 template    "
